title: Introducing Claude Science (now in beta)
summary: Anthropic launched Claude Science, a research app in public beta that runs analyses, searches databases, and traces computational steps with full reproducibility. It provides pre-configured support for genomics, single-cell analysis, proteomics, structural biology, and cheminformatics, with connections to 60+ scientific databases and deployment options on laptops, clusters, or on-demand GPUs.
writeup: Anthropic introduces Claude Science, a research application now in public beta that runs analyses, searches databases, and traces computational steps for full reproducibility. The app ships with pre-configured support for genomics, single-cell analysis, proteomics, structural biology, and cheminformatics, and it connects to more than 60 scientific databases. Deployment can run on laptops, clusters, or on-demand GPUs, extending the tool across common scientific computing setups.
